item.title: 1906 original orange crush soda
item.description: 2 tablespoons orange zest (3-4 small oranges or 2 large oranges) 1 cup freshly squeezed orange juice (juice of 3-4 small oranges or 2 large oranges) 1/2 cup granulated sugar Sparkling water

item.title: TIL: Saturn’s North Pole is a massive hexagon.
item.description: hexagon shaped storm at Saturn's north pole that's 20,000 miles across - wider than two Earths - made of ammonia and hydrogen winds blowing at 300mph,
item.dc:creator: DD1234567

item.title: "Every Republican president does this. Every Republican president cuts benefits for the poor, taxes for the rich & bombs a Middle East country. Trump promised he'd be different...while he & his allies told voters Kamala would send their kids to die."

item.title: The dolt has gone full lunatic.
item.description: Spain, a friendly western democracy has 50 million population and is a major global producer and exporter of agricultural products—notably olive oil (leading global exporter), wine, citrus fruits, and vegetables. Its economy also relies on exporting automobiles, vehicle components, machinery, chemicals, pharmaceuticals, and clothing. Key export partners include France, Germany, Portugal, Italy, and the US.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @Kenlifeofclay sculpted this and it's fantastic. Check out their other work in their posts, spider warning though!
27 Man Tax: Michael B. Jordan
“We're told every day, "You can't change the world." But the world is changing every day. Only question is … who's doing it? You or somebody else?” - J. Michael Straczynski So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: He’s retiring, and he’s pissing in their punch bowl on his way out
item.description: I’m not going to deny a W when we get one, let’s all enjoy this moment where a member of the discharge administration has to finally STFU and listen. https://bsky.app/profile/atrupar.com/post/3mg6dnx5auo25

item.title: Dwight D. Eisenhower's "Farewell Address" – The final public speech of Dwight D. Eisenhower as the 34th president of the United States was delivered in a television broadcast on January 17, 1961

item.title: If I know Microslop, it will be so much terrible than we can imagine.
item.description: https://bsky.app/profile/shoshana.bsky.social/post/3mg74rkzo7223 Obligatory Linux mention, you don’t have to put up with Microsoft and their wacky software, there is a better way forward. Actually, there are 24 better ways forward: https://www.linux.org/pages/download/ I’m a college dropout, with underwhelming intelligence, and I have a mild grasp of English and computers. I have been using Linux since (fuck, I actually forgot the year windows 8 came out). My point being, don’t shell out cash for microslop; get you a nice, stable distro of Linux, and feel the freedom of open source software. (I’ve been informed by reliable sources that I am now on a watch list because I used the word ‘microslop’ in my other posts. If I suddenly stop posting, y’all can
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Supergirl Body Paint - MCroft07
item.description: I AM IN THE UK AND HAVE BEEN BLOCKED FROM USING IMGUR!!! PLEASE FIND ME ON OTHER SOCIALS I AM TRYINGGGGGGG I'm on twitch most of the time btw I managed to get on here with a VPN but Imgur doesn't like Vpns so I might lose access again soon. Basically, every time I post is a day I can get on here. Thank you so much to those people who want to try and help me with private VPNs but I have really bad tech aura and I break a lot of things so this is truly the best way forward, also I'm scared of being told off for spamming on here haha. IF you still want to follow me and see what I am doing please PLEASE find me on https://linktr.ee/mcroft07?utm_source=linktree_profile_share I HATE THE GOVERNMENTS TOO Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I just looked at pictures of supergirl and did what I wanted with the design tbh. Wanted it to look harsher and more comicy than usual I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! Really proud of myself because I just bought a cheap top from Vinted and it was too small so I changed the back from a zipper to a corset style top to make it bigger to fit me and it worked! My secondary school textiles teacher would be proud of me! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Meet Vasko — a boar that became a Ukrainian defender’s bro. He is friendly and loves belly rubs.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Coming home.
item.description:
Ukrainian Defender Serhii, callsign "Nebo," called his wife and daughter to tell them that he had returned from his positions.
He and his brothers-in-arms from the 2nd Battalion of the 117th Territorial Defense Brigade spent 100 days at the positions in harsh winter conditions and under enemy pressure. Free Europe rests on these shoulders.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Ukrainian road sign, “Go fuck yourself” “Go fuck yourself again” “Go fuck yourself back in Russia”
item.description: Feb 2022. At the time, Ukrainians were actively changing signs and maps as a subtle form of psychological warfare to confuse and demoralize the invaders.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

A pancake.
